DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO ATTEND HER NOTICED DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO ATTEND HER DEPOSITION TO BE NOTICED BY PLAINTIFF AND TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Continued To Dec-07-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Defendant Speck Cab Co. Dba Veterans Cab Co.'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Comply With Order Of Court.
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Dismiss Complaint For Failure To Comply With Order Of Court Compelling Appearance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to appear at deposition would not result in compliance. Plaintiff's Complaint is ordered dismissed. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $786.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2005 Continued To Oct-26-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2005 Continued To Sep-14-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to attend her noticed deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to attend her deposition to be noticed by plaintiff and to be completed within 20 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $770, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)

Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Compel Attendance At Deposition & For Sanctions

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to attend her noticed deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to attend her deposition to be noticed by plaintiff and to be completed within 20 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $500, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
